content.query:
--Create login in the master database

use [master]
CREATE LOGIN [sa-sql-pbi] WITH PASSWORD = 'R3nu1tYPbi$reader1';
 
--Create user in Master database
use [master]
CREATE USER pbireader FROM LOGIN [pbireader]  WITH DEFAULT_SCHEMA=[dbo]
GO



--Create user in the database
use [rdc_sqlpool_prod]
CREATE USER pbireader FROM LOGIN [pbireader]  WITH DEFAULT_SCHEMA=[dbo]
GO

--Grant role to the user in the database
EXEC sp_addrolemember 'db_datareader', 'pbireader';


--Create login in the master database

use [master]
CREATE LOGIN [sa-sql-cubesw] WITH PASSWORD = 'sWIhu*#9Rlp!aNLD';
 
--Create user in Master database
use [master]
CREATE USER [sa-sql-cubesw] FROM LOGIN [sa-sql-cubesw]  WITH DEFAULT_SCHEMA=[dbo]
GO



--Create user in the database
use [rdc_sqlpool_prod]
CREATE USER [sa-sql-cubesw] FROM LOGIN [sa-sql-cubesw]  WITH DEFAULT_SCHEMA=[dbo]
GO

--Grant role to the user in the database
EXEC sp_addrolemember 'db_datareader', 'sa-sql-cubesw';
Exec sp_addrolemember 'db_datawriter', 'renuity-lead-score-model'



CREATE USER [amathur@renuityhome.com]
FROM EXTERNAL PROVIDER;


CREATE USER [arajdev@renuityhome.com]
FROM EXTERNAL PROVIDER;

EXEC sp_addrolemember 'db_datareader', [amathur@renuityhome.com]

EXEC sp_addrolemember 'db_datareader', [arajdev@renuityhome.com]

EXEC sp_addrolemember 'db_datareader', [mrathi@renuityhome.com]

Exec sp_addrolemember 'db_datawriter', [mrathi@renuityhome.com]


use [master]
CREATE USER  [mrathi@renuityhome.com]
FROM EXTERNAL PROVIDER;
GO

EXEC sp_addrolemember 'db_datareader', [mrathi@renuityhome.com]
